method: Anonymous-share TLS handshake requires a real browser context. Drove puppeteer to the share URL (which establishes SP federation cookies via redirect), enumerated via /_api/web/GetFolderByServerRelativeUrl('<path>')/{Folders,Files}, then downloaded via /_api/web/GetFileByServerRelativeUrl('<path>')/$value. Plain node fetch / curl ECONNRESETs at the TLS layer.

files.name: Demoville_A_RI_List_Apr26_DataRelease2.xlsx
files.description: Excel ResultsItem (RI) list for the customer inspection team — one row per leak.

files.name: Demoville_A_SHP_Apr26_DataRelease2.zip
files.description: Esri shapefile bundle: .shp/.shx/.dbf/.prj/.cpg/.sbn/.sbx/.lyr (with ArcMap layer file). Polygon geometry of every POI for the release.

files.name: Demoville_A_KML_Apr26_DataRelease2.kmz
files.description: Google Earth KMZ. Inside: doc.kml (1,965,656 B) with all POI polygons and a stylesheet.
